name: Create Credit Union
description_short: Create Credit Union (formerly Clark County Credit Union) is a Nevada-based credit union offering checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and credit cards with digital banking and member support services.
description_long:
Create Credit Union is a credit union that recently rebranded from Clark County Credit Union (CCCU), as noted on their website during the transition period. Based in Nevada with a routing number 322484113, the institution serves members through multiple physical locations and digital channels. The organization's stated mission is to empower members with personal service and support across all life stages—from managing finances and business needs to retirement planning.

Create Credit Union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business financial products. On the lending side, they provide auto loans (from 4.24% APR), auto refinancing, mortgages (including VA/FHA and land/construction financing), home equity lines of credit, personal loans, and credit cards (from 12.40% APR). For deposit products, they offer multiple checking account tiers (Bonus Checking Plus, Essential Checking, Spark Checking, CheckAgain), savings accounts, money market accounts, certificates of deposit (3-month CD at 3.82% APY), IRAs, and specialty savings clubs (Christmas Club, Vacation Club). They also provide business checking and commercial lending services.

Create CU differentiates itself through optional loan protection products including Guaranteed Asset Protection (GAP), Major Mechanical Protection (MMP), Collateral Protection Insurance, and Payment Protection on auto loans. They offer vehicle repossession prevention services and partner with Acrisure for auto and home insurance. The credit union provides digital banking tools (eStatements, Bill Pay, Zelle integration), financial education through the Banzai platform and their "Perfect Bite Podcast," and multiple contact channels including phone (702-228-2228), online loan applications, and an ATM network.

As a credit union rather than a commercial bank, Create CU operates under member-ownership principles and maintains NCUA deposit insurance. However, specific membership eligibility requirements are mentioned but not fully detailed on the homepage ("Who Can Join?" links throughout suggest variable membership criteria). The institution appears to serve the Las Vegas/Nevada market based on location references and area code. While they provide competitive rates and a broad product range, prospective members should verify current eligibility requirements and compare rates against other local and online alternatives. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Broad product range including auto loans, mortgages, personal loans, and credit cards in one institution
Multiple checking account options with tiered benefits (Bonus Checking Plus at 4.07% APY is competitive)
Comprehensive auto loan protections (GAP, mechanical protection, payment protection, repossession prevention)
Digital banking features including Zelle integration, bill pay, eStatements, and online loan applications
Financial education resources including Banzai platform and The Perfect Bite Podcast
Credit union structure provides NCUA deposit insurance and member-ownership principles
Partnership with established insurers (Acrisure, TruStage) for additional protection options
cons: Limited geographic presence as Nevada-based institution (primary service area appears to be Las Vegas region)
Membership eligibility requirements not fully transparent on website—must navigate to separate 'Who Can Join?' pages
No mention of mobile app functionality beyond general 'Digital Banking' reference
Competitive auto loan rate (4.24% APR) and credit card rate (12.40% APR) are not bottom-market offerings
Website still in transition period from CCCU rebrand, creating potential confusion and service disruption
best_for: Nevada residents seeking one-stop financial services from a credit union with local branches
Auto buyers wanting comprehensive loan protection products (GAP, mechanical coverage, payment protection)
Mortgage shoppers interested in VA/FHA or construction financing options
Members seeking competitive deposit rates (particularly the 4.07% APY Bonus Checking account)
diagnosis: Create Credit Union is best for Nevada residents seeking comprehensive banking and lending services from a credit union with local branch access. Primary caveat: geographic limitation to Nevada market, transition period from CCCU rebranding, and competitive rather than exceptional rates warrant comparison shopping against other regional and national credit unions.
services: Auto loans and auto loan refinancing
Mortgage loans including VA/FHA and land/construction financing
Multiple checking account products (Bonus Checking Plus, Essential Checking, Spark Checking)
Savings accounts, money market accounts, and certificates of deposit
Optional loan protections (GAP, mechanical protection, payment protection insurance)
Financial education (Banzai platform, Perfect Bite Podcast, calculators)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 6120 N Decatur Blvd, North Las Vegas, NV 89031
meta_description: Create Credit Union in Nevada offers checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and credit cards with digital banking.
